text: I have created the `extract.js` program inside `/app` that

correctly parses the binary and extracts the memory values exactly as required.

The script reads the ELF header and program headers, identifies
the `PT_LOAD` segments, and simulates mapping them into memory, honoring virtual memory offsets (`p_vaddr`)
and correctly zero-padding out to the required memory size (`p_memsz`). It iteratively reads chunks of 4-
bytes and writes them out as 32-bit integers to a standard JavaScript object mapping the correct memory addresses (base 10 string

keys automatically produced by JSON.stringify) to integer values.
